description: Etsy product search results (experimental/unverified — CAPTCHA blocked DOM probing, selectors based on historical knowledge)

_notes.unverified: This schema was NOT verified against live DOM — Etsy blocked probing with CAPTCHA. Selectors are based on historical Etsy DOM structure and may be outdated. Both [data-listing-id] and .v2-listing-card returned 0 matches during probing.
_notes.fallback: Raw text fallback is strongly recommended until this schema can be verified
